/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wno-long-long -pedantic -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/link.d -shared  -o libnmsoptplugin.so CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/allClassNMSOpt.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/decodeBBoxesOpt.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/detectionForwardOpt.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/gatherTopDetectionsOpt.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/nms_common.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/permuteConfData.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/topK.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/topKScoresPerClass.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/topKScoresPerClassFusedPermute.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/topKScoresPerImage.cu.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/nmsOptHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/nmsPluginOpt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmsoptplugin.dir/src/softmaxScore.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudnn.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
